spec.rawSql: SELECT status FROM servers WHERE id = '${server}'
SELECT last_uptime_seconds AS uptime FROM servers WHERE id = '${server}'
SELECT ip AS server_ip FROM server_inventory WHERE server_id = '${server}'

spec.description: TX is plotted on negative Y.
spec.title: Interface Traffic

spec.rawSql: SELECT cpu_model FROM server_inventory WHERE server_id = '${server}'
SELECT socket_count FROM server_inventory WHERE server_id = '${server}'
SELECT core_count || ' / ' || thread_count AS cpu_cores FROM server_inventory WHERE server_id = '${server}'
SELECT agent_version FROM servers WHERE id = '${server}'

spec.description: Estimated time until the disk is full: free space divided by a 1-day fill rate (used now minus used ~24h ago, over 86400s), evaluated at each chart point from raw samples. Works for any dashboard time range; needs at least ~18h of metric history.
spec.title: ETA Until Full

spec.description: TX is plotted on negative Y.
spec.title: Interface Traffic

spec.definition: SELECT server_name AS __text, id AS __value FROM servers ORDER BY server_name
spec.label: Server
spec.name: server

spec.query: SELECT server_name AS __text, id AS __value FROM servers ORDER BY server_name
spec.rawSql: SELECT server_name AS __text, id AS __value FROM servers ORDER BY server_name
